{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Karoshan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Karoshans are a species characterized by their immense physical stature, typically standing between nine and twelve feet tall. They possess thick skin in various shades such as bronze, indigo, blue, green, or yellow, and are easily identified by glowing hair that grows in thick, neon-like cable strands. While they are often perceived as intimidating or even monstrous by humans, they are known for being eloquent and capable of using both technology and [[Aether]]-based magic. Their biology often results in large families, with births frequently involving twins or triplets. As a civilization, the Karoshans maintain a powerful military presence, utilizing blocky, black spacecraft ranging from standard cruisers to massive six-mile-long dreadnoughts. Their society is organized under a monarchy, led by figures such as [[King]]-[[Regent]] [[Felrex]], and includes specialized roles like Combat Artists and intelligence agents. Their culture values [[alchemy]] and enchantment, and their architecture often features blocky, geometric designs. Despite their reputation as formidable soldiers, they also possess a complex social structure involving royalty, servants, and well-dressed nobility.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Karoshan are an eloquent species of warriors standing nine feet tall, characterized by neon-like hair that grows in thick strands from the back of their helmets. These people, who are associated with both space colonies and pirates, utilize plasma rifles and standard infantry helmets while employing [[Aethertech]] during patrols to identify individuals. Although they are considered superior to humans in nearly every respect, the [[Iron King]] is noted as being the equal of most of their kind. Currently engaged in a war against the [[Lichborn]], the Karoshan have seen an improvement in their diplomatic relations through the efforts of [[President Vashei]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Karoshans are a species known for being eloquent and superior to humans in virtually every respect.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Karoshans are superior to humans in virtually every respect.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Karoshans are nine feet tall.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan]] hair grows from the back of their helmets in cable-thick strands that shine like neon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan]] are a species with soldiers who use standard infantry issue helmets and plasma rifles.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Karoshans are a group that may have snuck something aboard the ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c7">''The Captain'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan]] patrols use [[Aethertech]] to identify individuals.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan]] is a type of space colony or people associated with [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan]] are a group of warriors.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Karoshans are a group of people.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] is the equal of most Karoshans.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karoshan]] is a group associated with pirates.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Karoshans are at war with the [[Lichborn]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[President Vashei]] improved relationships with the Karoshans.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Karoshan are a faction of exiles serving under the [[Rebel Queen]], [[Shyrax the Third]]. This group, which is sometimes compared to [[the Perfected]], travels in vessels that fly alongside [[The Last Horizon]] and utilizes Combat Artists clad in generic black uniforms and featureless helmets. During their activities, the Karoshans have seized an [[Advocate]] shuttle and were observed watching [[Mell]] and the narrator. Although they faced near-attacks from the Advocates and saw their cruisers retreating during a battle where they acted as enemies, the group continues to sweep the system for debris.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan]] soldiers are present in the training room.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan]] are a group of which Shyrax is [[Queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans normally give birth to twins or triplets.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Karoshans are a group of vessels flying alongside [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan]] is a group or faction.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan]] Combat Artists wear featureless black helmets and generic black uniforms.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans have taken over an [[Advocate]] shuttle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Karoshans were watching the narrator and [[Mell]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan ships]] were nearly attacked by the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax the Third]] is a [[Karoshan queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax needs to rally more Karoshans to her banner.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans call a Technician's gift a guidance.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans speak a language that [[Sola]] only knows a few words of.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Karoshans are a group that could potentially hunt the crew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans are members of the [[Rebel Queen]]'s force of exiles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan]] are a group mentioned in comparison to [[the Perfected]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Karoshans are an enemy group in the battle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan]] cruisers were retreating during the battle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans are sweeping the system of debris.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As one of the five intelligent species in the galaxy, the Karoshans are high-level Combat Artists who utilize mages that chant to the [[Aether]]. These beings, known as [[the Perfected]], stand nine or ten feet tall with neon cables instead of hair and possess scanning technology superior to that of the [[D’Niss]]. They maintain a fleet of blocky black ships and colonies, often utilizing Nova-Bot vessels to protect their lives. Although they are allies of the [[Empire]], they also function as an enemy group that demands the heads of those entering their system. During conflicts, Karoshans have been seen scavenging equipment like plasma pistols from the remains of fallen foes.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Karoshans use blocky black constructions for their ships and colonies.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Karoshans are nine or ten feet tall and have neon cables instead of hair.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Karoshans are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Karoshans paid the narrator's teacher for help.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Karoshans will ask for the heads of those who show up in their system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Karoshans are a group that Kyri may be avoiding.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karoshan]] are high-level Combat Artists.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Karoshans stand three feet higher than [[Visiri]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] have a fleet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] are Karoshans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nova-Bot ships]] are used to protect [[Karoshan]] lives.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karoshan]] are among the types of people depicted in [[arena]] fighter statues.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] are allies of the [[Empire]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The ships coming out of [[Subspace]] are [[Karoshan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] are a group with mages and ships.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Karoshans have much better scanning technology than the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A purple [[Karoshan]] plucked a plasma pistol from [[Omega]]'s remains.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Karoshans are an enemy group with a fleet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karoshan mages]] chant to the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Karoshans are an indigo-skinned species characterized by sharp fangs, lashing tails, and a birth rate that exceeds human standards. While refugees of the race reside on the planet [[Basyrryx]], they maintain a fleet of black, blocky ships used to provide cover fire against enemies. As allies of [[Visiria]], they have conducted research on the [[Iron Legion]] and provided relevant data, though some members have reported losing contact with their queen. [[Sola]] recognizes a specific rebel fleet of Karoshans as allies, even as the species maintains unique cultural traditions such as washing in a basin when entering a home.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan refugees]] live on the planet [[Basyrryx]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karoshans are part of a fleet that maintains fire on the enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karoshans are a group that is scurrying in the hangar and claims to have lost contact with their queen.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karoshans traditionally wash in a basin as they enter a home.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karoshans are a species with indigo skin, sharp fangs, and lashing tails.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karoshans have a high birth rate by human standards.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Karoshans have conducted research on the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Karoshans provided data.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Karoshans are allies of [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan ships]] provide cover fire.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan]] have a fleet of black, blocky ships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|There is a rebel fleet of Karoshans that [[Sola]] considers allies.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The laboratory on [[Karosha]] can hold one [[Karoshan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
